name: Spring Hills Golf Course
about: Spring Hills Golf Club & Fitting Center is an 18-hole public course and driving range in East Springfield, Ohio, featuring a newly-renovated Pro Shop with custom-fit equipment for all skill levels. The facility offers a state-of-the-art TrackMan indoor simulator for year-round golf practice and gameplay, along with professional club fitting services to optimize player performance.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan simulator for year-round play
Professional club fitting services with discounts on purchases
Convenient East Springfield location with driving range access

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services available on-site
No mention of alcohol services available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor golf simulator with real-time stats measuring club speed, attack angle, and spin rate

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the Pro Shop offers custom fitting services and is fully stocked with the latest name brands for any level of player.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify any food or drink services, so it's recommended to contact the Pro Shop directly regarding outside food and beverage policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify average completion times, but the TrackMan simulator allows play on over 100 golf courses including famous ones like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly mention child-specific features, but as a public course with simulator access, it may be suitable for families with children who are interested in golf.
